_description: Test vectors for OmniPod Eros packet encoding/decoding with CRC8

_format.name: Eros Packet (OmniKit-compatible)
_format.bytes[5..len-1]: data payload (max 31 bytes for pdm/pod/con, 4 for ack)

packet_vectors.description: Decode PDM packet from raw bytes (same as pdm_basic)
First PDM fragment of long message (31 bytes max)

packet_vectors.notes: Final fragment is shorter (21 bytes < 31 max)

crc8_vectors.description: CRC8 of packet data (excluding CRC byte)

python_compat.description: Python parsing logic for Eros packets
python_compat.code:
import struct

CRC8_TABLE = [
    0x00, 0x07, 0x0E, 0x09, 0x1C, 0x1B, 0x12, 0x15, 0x38, 0x3F, 0x36, 0x31, 0x24, 0x23, 0x2A, 0x2D,
    0x70, 0x77, 0x7E, 0x79, 0x6C, 0x6B, 0x62, 0x65, 0x48, 0x4F, 0x46, 0x41, 0x54, 0x53, 0x5A, 0x5D,
    0xE0, 0xE7, 0xEE, 0xE9, 0xFC, 0xFB, 0xF2, 0xF5, 0xD8, 0xDF, 0xD6, 0xD1, 0xC4, 0xC3, 0xCA, 0xCD,
    0x90, 0x97, 0x9E, 0x99, 0x8C, 0x8B, 0x82, 0x85, 0xA8, 0xAF, 0xA6, 0xA1, 0xB4, 0xB3, 0xBA, 0xBD,
    0xC7, 0xC0, 0xC9, 0xCE, 0xDB, 0xDC, 0xD5, 0xD2, 0xFF, 0xF8, 0xF1, 0xF6, 0xE3, 0xE4, 0xED, 0xEA,
    0xB7, 0xB0, 0xB9, 0xBE, 0xAB, 0xAC, 0xA5, 0xA2, 0x8F, 0x88, 0x81, 0x86, 0x93, 0x94, 0x9D, 0x9A,
    0x27, 0x20, 0x29, 0x2E, 0x3B, 0x3C, 0x35, 0x32, 0x1F, 0x18, 0x11, 0x16, 0x03, 0x04, 0x0D, 0x0A,
    0x57, 0x50, 0x59, 0x5E, 0x4B, 0x4C, 0x45, 0x42, 0x6F, 0x68, 0x61, 0x66, 0x73, 0x74, 0x7D, 0x7A,
    0x89, 0x8E, 0x87, 0x80, 0x95, 0x92, 0x9B, 0x9C, 0xB1, 0xB6, 0xBF, 0xB8, 0xAD, 0xAA, 0xA3, 0xA4,
    0xF9, 0xFE, 0xF7, 0xF0, 0xE5, 0xE2, 0xEB, 0xEC, 0xC1, 0xC6, 0xCF, 0xC8, 0xDD, 0xDA, 0xD3, 0xD4,
    0x69, 0x6E, 0x67, 0x60, 0x75, 0x72, 0x7B, 0x7C, 0x51, 0x56, 0x5F, 0x58, 0x4D, 0x4A, 0x43, 0x44,
    0x19, 0x1E, 0x17, 0x10, 0x05, 0x02, 0x0B, 0x0C, 0x21, 0x26, 0x2F, 0x28, 0x3D, 0x3A, 0x33, 0x34,
    0x4E, 0x49, 0x40, 0x47, 0x52, 0x55, 0x5C, 0x5B, 0x76, 0x71, 0x78, 0x7F, 0x6A, 0x6D, 0x64, 0x63,
    0x3E, 0x39, 0x30, 0x37, 0x22, 0x25, 0x2C, 0x2B, 0x06, 0x01, 0x08, 0x0F, 0x1A, 0x1D, 0x14, 0x13,
    0xAE, 0xA9, 0xA0, 0xA7, 0xB2, 0xB5, 0xBC, 0xBB, 0x96, 0x91, 0x98, 0x9F, 0x8A, 0x8D, 0x84, 0x83,
    0xDE, 0xD9, 0xD0, 0xD7, 0xC2, 0xC5, 0xCC, 0xCB, 0xE6, 0xE1, 0xE8, 0xEF, 0xFA, 0xFD, 0xF4, 0xF3
]

PACKET_TYPES = {
    0b111: 'pod',
    0b101: 'pdm',
    0b100: 'con',
    0b010: 'ack'
}

def crc8(data: bytes) -> int:
    """Calculate CRC8 for Eros packet."""
    crc = 0
    for byte in data:
        crc = CRC8_TABLE[(crc ^ byte) & 0xFF]
    return crc

def parse_eros_packet(data: bytes) -> dict:
    """Parse an Eros packet from raw bytes."""
    if len(data) < 7:
        raise ValueError('Insufficient data for packet')
    
    address = struct.unpack('>I', data[0:4])[0]
    type_seq_byte = data[4]
    packet_type_raw = type_seq_byte >> 5
    sequence_num = type_seq_byte & 0x1F
    
    if packet_type_raw not in PACKET_TYPES:
        raise ValueError(f'Unknown packet type: {packet_type_raw}')
    
    # Verify CRC
    expected_crc = crc8(data[:-1])
    actual_crc = data[-1]
    if expected_crc != actual_crc:
        raise ValueError(f'CRC mismatch: expected {expected_crc:#04x}, got {actual_crc:#04x}')
    
    payload = data[5:-1]
    
    return {
        'address': address,
        'addressHex': f'0x{address:08x}',
        'packetType': PACKET_TYPES[packet_type_raw],
        'packetTypeRaw': packet_type_raw,
        'sequenceNum': sequence_num,
        'data': payload.hex(),
        'dataLen': len(payload),
        'crc8': actual_crc
    }

def encode_eros_packet(address: int, packet_type: str, sequence_num: int, data: bytes) -> bytes:
    """Encode an Eros packet to raw bytes."""
    type_map = {'pod': 0b111, 'pdm': 0b101, 'con': 0b100, 'ack': 0b010}
    type_raw = type_map[packet_type]
    
    # Build packet without CRC
    packet = struct.pack('>I', address)
    packet += bytes([(type_raw << 5) | (sequence_num & 0x1F)])
    packet += data
    
    # Append CRC
    packet += bytes([crc8(packet)])
    return packet
